name: AsyncTaskExtensions
summary: Tools for working productively with AsyncTask's

methods.name: AllComplete(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask>, System.Action<System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask>>)
methods.summary: Await the completion of a collection of scheduled tasks. The given action will only be executed after all events are complete or discarded. The tasks must already be scheduled and not yet completed or this action will never be executed.

returns.doc: An IDisposable representing all of the event subscription

methods.name: Then(Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask, Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTaskCompletedHandler)
methods.summary: Upon completion of the task, invoke the specified action

returns.doc: An IDisposable representing the event subscription

methods.name: ThenPost(Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask, Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTaskCompletedHandler, System.Threading.SynchronizationContext)
methods.signature: System.IDisposable ThenPost(Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask task, Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTaskCompletedHandler action, System.Threading.SynchronizationContext context)
methods.summary: Upon completion of the task, invoke the action asynchronously in the specified SynchronizationContext

returns.doc: An IDisposable representing the event subscription

methods.name: ThenSend(Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask, Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTaskCompletedHandler, System.Threading.SynchronizationContext)
methods.signature: System.IDisposable ThenSend(Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTask task, Dynamo.Scheduler.AsyncTaskCompletedHandler action, System.Threading.SynchronizationContext context)
methods.summary: Upon completion of the task, invoke the action synchronously in the specified SynchronizationContext

returns.doc: An IDisposable representing the event subscription
